AddCacheNodes.clientToken: Ensures idempotency of the API call
AddCacheNodes.type: Cache access type to be added in MasterManaged deployment mode; currently supported values: * BCC: Baidu Cloud Server (BCC); * IDC: Self-built data center
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes: List of node information to be added; see appendix AddCacheNodeInfo
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.config: Node configuration in JSON format string, default: {  "systemConfig": {    "vm.max_map_count": 524288,    "fs.aio-max-nr": 10485760  },  "resourceConfig": {    "requestCpu": 4,    "limitCpu": 16,    "requestMem": "2GiB",    "limitMem": "8GiB"  },  "serviceConfig": {    "min_log_level": 1  }}
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.diskInfos: Disk information for the joining node, see appendix DiskInfo. The "format" field is required, indicating whether to format the disk before joining. Enum values: * true: must provide the dev device to format; "dev" and "mountPath" are required; * false: must provide diskQuotaGiB for the specified path; "mountPath" and "diskQuotaGiB" are required
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.deployPath: Deployment path for the cache node service; default is /home/.rapidfs/
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.bccInfo: BCC cache node information, required when cache node type is BCC, see appendix BCCCacheNodeInfo. "bccId" is required
AddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.idcInfo: IDC cache node information, required when cache node type is IDC, see appendix IDCCacheNodeInfo. "sshUser", "sshPassword", and "sshPort" are required
